questions.q: Who is reportedly being considered by King Charles to write the first official biography of Queen Elizabeth II?
questions.correctText: King Charles wants historian Anna Keay to write the first official biography of Queen Elizabeth II.

questions.q: Which former major league infielder and manager, known as 'Scrap Iron,' died at the age of 76?
questions.correctText: Phil Garner, a three-time All-Star infielder and manager who led the Houston Astros to their first World Series appearance, has died at 76.

questions.q: In which country will 'Agito: Psychic War' be released theatrically on April 29, 2026?
questions.correctText: Agito: Psychic War is scheduled for a theatrical release in Japan on April 29, 2026.

questions.q: What new content is coming to Dome Keeper on April 13, 2026, including a free multiplayer update and a paid DLC called 'The Lost Keepers'?
options: The Infiltrator and The Beastmaster keepers, new assignments, and pets.
A new story mode and increased enemy difficulty.
A different set of playable characters with unique abilities.
An expanded mining system and new base defenses.
questions.correctText: The DLC introduces two new keepers, The Infiltrator and The Beastmaster, along with new assignments and pets, while the free update adds multiplayer modes.

questions.q: Bob Hall, a pioneer in wheelchair racing and a two-time Boston Marathon champion, passed away at what age?
questions.correctText: Bob Hall, who was the first official wheelchair champion of the Boston Marathon in 1975 and also won in 1977, has died at the age of 74.

questions.q: An opinion piece discusses the perception of game developers. What is a common accusation made against developers that the article argues is unfounded?
options: That they prioritize profit over quality
That they engage in crunch time
That they don't listen to player feedback
questions.correctText: The article argues that the accusation of developers being 'lazy' is unfounded, especially given the long hours and demanding nature of the industry.

questions.q: What is the title of the book detailing the Roosevelt brothers' 1929 expedition to find a giant panda?
options: The Beast in the Clouds: The Roosevelt Brothers' Deadly Quest to Find the Mythical Giant Panda
Quest for the Panda: The Roosevelt Brothers' Himalayan Adventure
Roosevelt's Boys and the Black-and-White Bear
The Panda Hunters of the Himalayas
questions.correctText: The book detailing this expedition is titled "The Beast in the Clouds: The Roosevelt Brothers' Deadly Quest to Find the Mythical Giant Panda."

questions.q: What is the title of the new horror novella by John Davies, writer of "Hobo with a Shotgun"?
questions.correctText: The new horror novella by John Davies is titled 'MAN VS. BEAR'.

questions.q: Which Hollywood actors are among the over 1,000 names who signed an open letter opposing the Paramount-Warner deal?
options: Joaquin Phoenix, Ben Stiller, and Kristen Stewart
Tom Hanks, Meryl Streep, and Leonardo DiCaprio
Denzel Washington, Scarlett Johansson, and Brad Pitt
Ryan Reynolds, Blake Lively, and Chris Pratt
questions.correctText: Joaquin Phoenix, Ben Stiller, and Kristen Stewart are among the Hollywood names who signed an open letter opposing the Paramount-Warner deal.

questions.q: Mom's Book Nook has donated how many books to children in Sarasota over the past year?
questions.correctText: Mom's Book Nook has donated more than 7,000 books to children in Sarasota over the past year.
